# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Generate a backup archive using tar"
  task :generate, [:archive_name, :path] => :environment do |t, args|
    backup_name = args[:archive_name]
    path = args[:path]
    
    if backup_name.nil? || path.nil?
      puts "Error: Please provide both archive name and path."
      exit(1)
    end

    command = %Q{tar -czf #{backup_name}.tar.gz -C #{File.dirname(path)} #{File.basename(path)}}
    output = `#{command}`
    
    if $?.success?
      puts "Backup created successfully: #{backup_name}.tar.gz"
    else
      puts "Error creating backup: #{output}"
    end
  end
end
